_comment: Two-track Job Hunt OS config. Copy this file to context_store.json and fill in your own values. Every job is scored against BOTH tracks. If both clear threshold, the digest flags it as a dual match and you pick the resume.
_setup: 1. Copy to config/context_store.json  2. Fill in your details  3. Never commit context_store.json — it is in .gitignore

candidate.name: Your Full Name
candidate.status: Brief description of your current status and what you are looking for.

shared.role_priority: Describe what matters most to you — visibility, impact, title, etc.

salary.note: Set your TC floor. Pipeline surfaces roles up to ceiling to keep volume moving.

dual_match_behavior: If a job clears threshold on both tracks, flag it as DUAL MATCH and let the user pick the resume. Do not auto-select.

ai.label: AI PM Track
ai.positioning: Describe your AI PM positioning in one sentence.
ai.domain_preference: Domain-agnostic. AI must be core to the product, not a bolt-on.
dealbreakers: AI is marketing only — thin wrapper, not building with models
PM is order-taker with no metrics ownership
No AI in the core product

domain.label: Domain PM Track (rename to match your domain — adtech, fintech, healthtech, etc.)
domain.positioning: Describe your domain-specific positioning in one sentence.
domain.domain_preference: Describe your target domain — programmatic, CTV, marketplace, etc.
dealbreakers: Pure sales or account management role, not product

company_profile.stage: Describe your target company stage — Series B+, established, startup, etc.
company_profile.avoid: Describe company types you want to avoid.
